title: smilax bona-nox var. hastata
intro: Smilax bona-nox var. hastata, also known as the thicket coral root or greenbrier, is a type of vine that belongs to the Smilax genus of flowering plants. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, such as wounds, skin infections, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Smilax bona-nox var. hastata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying the roots and leaves, then infusing them in water or alcohol to create teas, tinctures, or salves.
